problem.summary: Gather values from input through an index map and scatter values back through the same map. The benchmark can run an irregular permutation mode or a coalesced identity mode to expose memory-transaction effects.
outputs: index is i when coalesced_mode is nonzero
constraints: indices must be a permutation of 0..n-1 in irregular mode
input, gathered, and scattered do not alias
n may not be a multiple of four

verification.method: Harness compares gathered and scattered outputs against a CPU reference for irregular and coalesced index modes.

curation.notes: No GPU timing has been collected. Treat any future HIP-event-only result as timing-only unless profiler counters are attached.
